plurals.item: Messages in the Trash will be permanently deleted after %d days.

Messages in the Trash will be permanently deleted after %d days.
Messages in the Trash will be permanently deleted after %d days.

"Deleted messages will stay in the Trash for %d day before they're deleted forever."
"Deleted messages will stay in the Trash for %d days before they're deleted forever."
"Deleted messages will stay in the Trash for %d days before they're deleted forever."

"It's %1$s and %2$d other contacts' birthday! Send something special?"
"It's %1$s and %2$d other contacts' birthday! Send something special?"

plurals.name: chat_service_management_description_skt
plurals.item:
"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minutes before registering again."

"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minute before registering again."

"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minutes before registering again."

"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minutes before registering again."

"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minutes before registering again."

"If you deregister from Chatting+, you won't be able to create or join one-on-one and group chats, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. Are you sure you want to deregister?
You'll also have to wait %d minutes before registering again."

plurals.name: display_category_message
plurals.item: Only %1$d category tabs can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.
Only %1$d category tab can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.
Only %1$d category tabs can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.
Only %1$d category tabs can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.
Only %1$d category tabs can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.
Only %1$d category tabs can be shown on the main screen. The rest are hidden. Select the %2$s category if you want quick access to it from the main screen.

plurals.name: group_chat_max_recipient_exceed
plurals.item: "%1$s can't join group chats. Remove them from the selected recipients, or send a text message to up to %2$d recipients instead."
"%1$s can't join group chats. Remove them from the selected recipients, or send a text message to up to %2$d recipient instead."
"%1$s can't join group chats. Remove them from the selected recipients, or send a text message to up to %2$d recipients instead."
"%1$s can't join group chats. Remove them from the selected recipients, or send a text message to up to %2$d recipients instead."

"%1$s can't join group chats. Remove them from the selected recipients, or send a text message to up to %2$d recipients instead."

plurals.name: group_chat_max_recipient_exceed_att
plurals.item:
"One or more of the included recipients aren't Advanced Messaging capable, so your group is limited to %d members.
To continue, select only Advanced Messaging capable members. They're marked with a blue dot icon."

"One or more of the included recipients aren't Advanced Messaging capable, so your group is limited to %d member.
To continue, select only Advanced Messaging capable members. They're marked with a blue dot icon."

"One or more of the included recipients aren't Advanced Messaging capable, so your group is limited to %d members.
To continue, select only Advanced Messaging capable members. They're marked with a blue dot icon."

"One or more of the included recipients aren't Advanced Messaging capable, so your group is limited to %d members.
To continue, select only Advanced Messaging capable members. They're marked with a blue dot icon."

plurals.name: group_chat_max_recipient_exceed_us
plurals.item: To start a group chat, remove the last selected recipient. If you want to include the last recipient, remove %d recipients to send a message.
To start a group chat, remove the last selected recipient. If you want to include the last recipient, remove %d recipient to send a message.
To start a group chat, remove the last selected recipient. If you want to include the last recipient, remove %d recipients to send a message.

plurals.name: message_suggestions_info_dialog_body_second
plurals.item: When you tap the Message suggestions button, the last %d messages in your conversation will be processed online. AI-generated suggestions may be inaccurate or contain inappropriate content.
